gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/164)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ فِي سِتَّةِ إِخْوَةٍ وَ جَدٍّ قَالَ لِلْجَدِّ السُّبُعُ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Abdullah Bin Jabala, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying regarding six brothers and a grandfather. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘For the grandfather is the seventh’.
en.sarwar: 5. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad ibn Sama‘ah, from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jabalah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying about six brothers and a grandfather, ‘The grandfather is the seventh.’”
